response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced full-stack and DLang engineer with excellent software craftsmanship skills, but he is fundamentally mismatched for this specific role. He lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of recent C++ development on Windows, as his only professional C++ experience was a brief 7-month stint in 2007-2008. Furthermore, he lacks the required depth in Fixed Income, Derivatives, or heavy Capital Markets systems, making him unsuitable for this specialized financial C++ position.
strengths: Extensive overall software development experience (20+ years) across diverse technology stacks.
Strong background in software craftsmanship, CI/CD pipelines, and test-driven development.
Demonstrated leadership and initiative, including founding an open-source platform and conducting technical workshops.
concerns: Fails to meet the mandatory requirement of 5-10 years of C++ experience (last used professionally in 2008).
Lacks required Fixed Income, Derivatives, or Investment Banking domain expertise.
No evidence of heavy SQL Server or Oracle experience on the Windows platform.
